name: showcase
description: Storybook story creation, catalog management, and Visual Regression integration. UI component docs, visual testing, and CSF 3.0/Factories story creation. Supports Storybook 10 and React Cosmos.

capabilities.summary: Storybook story creation (CSF 3.0, factories, MDX 3, autodocs, play functions)
React Cosmos fixture creation (Cosmos 6+, useFixtureInput, decorators)
Chromatic, Playwright VRT, Lost Pixel, Applitools Eyes integration
axe-core rules and WCAG 2.2 AA verification
Reuse stories in unit/Vitest tests via composeStories
Component reuse rate and design-code alignment tracking
